target: EXP-450 pre-integration correction notes: 4 structural issues + 1 accessibility fix the decider must resolve before integrating EXP-450
summary: EXP-450 (HOL-HIERARCHY c2 restructure) is currently status='ready-for-integration'. Five orphan issues were filed against it before integration. This EXP documents all five for the decider's attention — none require new research, all are verifiable against the EXP-450 text. ISS-2352 (22.6 Hz formula-switching) was escalated to Opus analyst (see escalate-to-analyst-ISS-2352.json).

correction_notes.description: EXP-450 P5 (update-part1-tier-classification) expands Tier-1 framing to sections 1.5/1.7/1.8/1.9 only — drops §1.6. The parent HOL-HIERARCHY c2 curmudgeon review named all five: 1.5/1.6/1.7/1.8/1.9. Dropping §1.6 without explanation will cause the next curmudgeon review to flag the omission.
correction_notes.suggested_decider_action: Before integrating P5, either (a) add §1.6 to the Tier-1 classification update, or (b) add an explicit note in P5's patch text explaining why §1.6 was excluded (different argument type, already covered elsewhere, etc.).

correction_notes.description: EXP-450 P0 operation 4 instructs pasting the Part 2 Summary BEFORE the closing <!-- ═══ Part 2b ═══ --> comment. But that comment is INSIDE the cosmological-cluster's closing </details> tag at sections.json:part2 HTML offset 58,682. Applying the patch as written would place the Summary mid-structure inside a closing </details>.
correction_notes.suggested_decider_action: Verify the anchor point in current sections.json part2.html before applying P0. The Summary block should be appended AFTER the last </details> in Part 2's main argument sequence, not inside a closing structural tag. Find the actual offset of the nearest structural boundary and adjust the patch anchor.

correction_notes.description: EXP-450 sequencing_note (if present) says P4 (V13 coordinate promotion) must land BEFORE P0-P3 (which anchor on post-Summary §2.10-2.12 positions). But recommended_decider_action says push P0+P1+P2+P3 as the default bundle without mentioning this P4-before-P0 dependency.
correction_notes.suggested_decider_action: If integrating as a bundle, land P4 first, verify section numbering in sections.json, then apply P0-P3. Add a sequencing note to the integration commit message.

correction_notes.description: P3b updates visible <span class='ds-fm-status-sub'> text to add the ~1 nT discriminating window detail, but does NOT update the surrounding role='status' aria-label attribute which still reads the old wording. Screen-reader users miss the ~1 nT detail.
correction_notes.suggested_decider_action: When applying P3b, update the aria-label attribute on the surrounding role='status' element to include the ~1 nT wording alongside the span text update.

correction_notes.description: A new caption text in EXP-450 reads 'We will upgrade the relevant verdict if any one is met' — weaker phrasing than the prior 'any one is sufficient to upgrade a verdict'. A dome defender can exploit 'if any one is met' as a conditional promise rather than a firm commitment.
correction_notes.suggested_decider_action: Change the caption to 'Any one of these conditions is sufficient to upgrade the relevant verdict.' or restore the original 'any one is sufficient' phrasing.

escalated_items.reason: Requires scientific analysis of which averaging convention (H_eff = H₀·(L/R)·(1−exp(−R/L)) ≈ 3,316 km vs. H(0)=8,537 km pole-floor) gives 22.6 Hz, and how EXP-450 P2 should accurately characterize this. Judgment-heavy — escalated to Opus analyst.

notes: No patches applied to source files — this is a pre-integration advisory for the decider. EXP-450 integration should address all 5 items before pushing.
